title: My Half-Sister Stole Dad's Dementia-Signed Building, Dumped Him. So I Turned Her Home Into A Grief Center.
description: My half-sister swindled our demented father's building and dumped him in a state home. I found the medical records, proved he couldn't consent, won a lawsuit, and when she couldn't pay, I accepted her home's deed, evicted her, and opened a grief center. #ElderAbuse #Revenge #Caregiver
thumb_text: I TURNED HER BETRAYAL INTO A CAREGIVER SANCTUARY

thumb_lines.text: MEDICAL RECORDS SHOWED HE WAS SEDATED AND COULD NOT CONSENT
TURNED HER HOME INTO A GRIEF CENTER
